# Security Requirements Checklist: Store Credit Card Information

**Purpose**: Validate security and resilience quality of UC-12 requirements
before implementation  
**Created**: 2026-03-14  
**Feature**: [/Users/ahsanmansoor/ECE493Group19/specs/012-store-credit-card/spec.md](/Users/ahsanmansoor/ECE493Group19/specs/012-store-credit-card/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based
on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are tokenization-only storage requirements explicitly defined for all card persistence paths? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK002 Does the spec explicitly forbid full PAN persistence and display in all relevant user flows? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK003 Are rejection and unavailability non-persistence requirements both defined and distinguishable? [Completeness, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK004 Are duplicate active-token handling requirements fully specified for repeated submissions? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 Is "safe rejection feedback" defined with clear boundaries on what must be excluded from user messaging? [Clarity, Spec §FR-009]
- [ ] CHK006 Is processor unavailability detection quantified with an explicit timeout threshold? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK007 Are "authenticated student" access constraints specific enough to avoid ambiguity in who can add payment methods? [Clarity, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK008 Is "selectable for fee payment" defined with measurable acceptance behavior rather than implied behavior? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK009 Do user-story acceptance scenarios align with functional requirements for rejection and retry behavior? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK010 Do edge-case expectations align with duplicate-token and timeout requirements without conflicting outcomes? [Consistency, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK011 Are UC-12 mappings consistent across stories, requirements, and success criteria? [Consistency, Spec §User Stories, Spec §FR-011]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK012 Are success criteria objective and measurable for all three primary outcomes (success, rejection, unavailable)? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-002]
- [ ] CHK013 Can masked-data visibility requirements be validated without implementation assumptions? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004]
- [ ] CHK014 Is completion-time expectation stated in a way that can be consistently tested? [Measurability, Spec §SC-003]

## Scenario and Edge-Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK015 Are primary, rejection, and unavailable scenarios all represented with explicit expected outcomes? [Coverage, Spec §User Stories]
- [ ] CHK016 Are malformed input and expired-card boundary cases explicitly addressed in requirement-level text? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK017 Are retry semantics defined for rejection while avoiding persistence side effects? [Coverage, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK018 Are outage guidance expectations complete for both "try later" and "alternate method" outcomes? [Coverage, Spec §FR-006]

## Dependencies and Assumptions

- [ ] CHK019 Are external payment processor dependency assumptions and failure modes documented in planning artifacts? [Dependency, Plan §Technical Context, Research §Decision 4]
- [ ] CHK020 Are traceability requirements to UC-12 and UC-12-AS explicit enough to gate implementation readiness? [Traceability, Spec §FR-011]

## Notes

- Focus areas selected: Security/privacy requirements quality and failure-mode
  completeness.
- Depth level: Standard (recommended default applied).
- Actor/timing: Reviewer during PR and pre-implementation planning.
